name: first-principles
description: Evaluations for first-principles skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants to challenge assumptions or reason from fundamentals

prompts.input: 用第一性原理重新审视我们的缓存策略
Let's apply first principles thinking to this pricing model
why do we assume we need a message queue here? challenge that assumption
重新思考我们为什么要用微服务架构
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '重新思考' + challenging architectural assumption

prompts.input: What are the fundamental assumptions behind our deployment pipeline?

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for non-thinking or other-domain requests

prompts.input: Help me write a Python class for data processing
prompts.reason: Code writing request, not a thinking exercise

prompts.input: Create a product roadmap for next quarter
Why does this test keep failing? Do a root cause analysis
prompts.reason: Root cause analysis should trigger five-whys, not first-principles
